title: 9 Herbal Essential Oils For Knee Swelling
description: Eucalyptus globulus essential oils contains the bioactive constituents eucalyptol and alpha-pinene. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which can help reduce swelling and pain in the knees. Eucalyptol works by inhibiting the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes, while alpha-pinene has a numbing effect on the nerve endings, reducing the sensation of pain. The oil's decongestant properties also help to clear out excess fluid from the affected area, reducing...
